commands.case_dry_run: .venv/bin/python scripts/pdf_lab/run_page_second_pass_dag.py --pdf /mnt/storage12tb/extractor_corpus/source/standards/NIST_SP_800-53r5.pdf --manifest artifacts/pdf_lab/next_candidate_selection_page31_20260721T1315Z/candidate_manifest.json --sampled-cases artifacts/pdf_lab/next_candidate_selection_page31_20260721T1315Z/sampled_page_cases.json --out artifacts/pdf_lab/page31_deterministic_evidence_20260721T1315Z --case-id page_case_0001_p0031 --ledger python/pdf_oxide/presets/document_families/nist_sp_800_53r5_promotion_ledger.json --apply-mode release --dpi 150 --model local-text --batch-id page31-deterministic-20260721 --review-mode dry_run --scillm-preflight-mode dry_run --patch-mode dry_run --commit-mode dry_run --page-orchestrator-mode dry_run --page-extract-timeout-s 90

observations: The rendered HTML review artifact shows the original page image and annotated candidate image in the before-evidence section.
The annotated image shows page31 candidate boxes, including side-chrome regions, body text/list regions, footnotes, and a table-region candidate.
The rendered artifact shows selected candidate JSON blocks for all 15 page31 candidates.
The review validation section visibly reports dry_run_review_not_executed, and the artifact links section is visible at the bottom of the rendered page.

proves: Page31 deterministic evidence materialization produced original image, annotated image, extracted page JSON, candidate presets, review request, HTML, and ZIP artifacts.
The generated review bundle is package-valid and terminal-ledger-valid for a dry-run still_open page case.
The HTML review artifact was rendered in a browser and captured as a 1280 x 10517 PNG screenshot.
does_not_prove: Any Tau-native PDF Lab model transport contract execution.
Any semantic extraction correctness for page31.
Closure of the active all-candidates hardening goal.

current_blocker.reason: A live model-backed second pass for page31 must run through a Tau-owned route; pdf_oxide must not call SciLLM directly or through local wrapper code.
